name: Beurre Blanc (for Fish) - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Reduce the white wine and shallots over high heat until the wine is reduced to half its original volume.
2. Remove from heat and whisk in butter gradually, ensuring each addition is fully emulsified before adding more.
Source: Great Chefs of New Orleans, Tele-record Productions - 1983
www.greatchefs.com - 747 Magazine Street, New Orleans, LA 70130
Chef Daniel Bonnot, Louis XVI Restaurant, Marie Antoinette Hotel, New Orleans
